column1: Hey payton evans, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Our group is 11, if it's easier we can break into groups of 4,4,&3
Cool I got you! which destination were you lookin to book
Can we get options for both
yea both are dope ill personally be in Punta Cana
how many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
oh dope we got a bunch of fsu groups rollin with us. y'all are lit fr lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Laughed at “oh dope we got a bunch of fsu groups rollin with us. y'all are lit fr lol”
okay dope! I'll send what we have so you can take a look and then we could move to the next steps
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send to?
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Gonna send them to the group and all chat
bet bet lmk what the group thinks!
Liked “bet bet lmk what the group thinks!”
hey Peyton whats up, how we feelin about those options so far?
Hi, I think we're going to do the Punta Cana 5 nights at Occidental
Is that one slightly nicer than Riu? TikTok says it is lol
okay cool yea. i'll be there with y'all
I personally like it a little better
Ok yeah TikTok said it was a little nicer like better food
Also I think we're gonna add someone to our group
Aight bet. y'all ready to get it secured this weekend?
hey Peyton checkin in, did we want to get a reservation started?
Hi yes sorry I think we're ready to book
okay dope. Ill set the reservation up in a few. March 14-19 three rooms of 4 right
Is there a group rate? Like do we book individually?
Also is there a way to include flights for some people that want that?
yea so everyone gets their own account and makes their own payments. gonna send you all of it in email and then I'll explain it here
just sent over an email with the reservation. its titled your reservation - punta cana

you'll share that link with your group. each person selects join trip, hops into a room slot, enters their own details, and makes their own deposit of $200 to secure their spot. from there, your final balance isnt due until the 25th. so it gives you some time to gather yourself for the rest
Does the $200 have to be today?
And is the room slot first come first serve?
you can each choose whichever room slot you want. and I can also move around a little afterward if needed
but like you get tho choose your roomates
What if some people weren't prepared to pay $200 today😂
lol how much time did ppl need?
Does the payment go through the hotel or travel website?
everything is through the portal I sent in the email. did you get that?
Does passport stuff have to be filled out now
Some people just renewed theirs and are waiting
nah you can skip that for now! itll let you past it
One of the rooms shows all 4 reserved because someone started filling out info and closed the link
All good thatll clear in a sec
Is there a way to kick out one of the "temporarily reserved spots" so someone can redo
Because we refreshed and it still shows it as temporarily resorted
Every time we refresh it shows spot 2 switching between two people who went for it I think?
On your end does room one show 4 people?
For room 1 we want it to be Payton, Alana, Sofia, and Charlotte
Word did Sofia hop in the last slot?
She's trying to but it says she already registered her email
She can try again on the 4th slot
What makes a spot reserved vs temporary reserved
Means your account is fully created
How do people add a flight package if they want to
how many ppl wanted to add flights? its typically cheapest for ppl to get flights separately on their own. but if they want the convenience of it all being in one shot we can def take a look
which airport we wanna fly out of?
ok wait I think we may just book individually
We're all leaving out of Atlanta
lol this sounds bad to ask but like the hotel isn't too gross right like we're not gonna come out of this with horror stories 😂 TikTok is what made us change from Cancun so just curious
you'll like this resort. the one in Cancun can be gross fs
Occidental Punta Cana is a vibe. nice and clean
Is there a way to get the rooms near each other?
yea just gotta request it at the time of check in. all depends on what the hotel has available at the time you get to the desk
you can request same building, same floor, next to eachother, and they will accommodate best way they can
since we dont know what else they have booked on other days between their check in and check outs we have no way of knowing which physical room will be assigned
our onsite staff can assist you with the request
How many buildings are there? At the resort
I wanna say like 15, each are 3 floors
oh shittt ok hopefully they can get us in the same building
Is there like a map of this place 😂
lmao yea there is. you'll get the hang of it pretty quickly tho
hey did Alexa still plan on going? she hasn't deposited yet operations is asking
yes she is I'll text her
Is the rest of the payment absolutely due today
yea if someone needs a specific arrangement I can def put the request in
when do we get room/building info
your physical room and building is assigned during check in based on what the hotel desk attendant has available with their other reservations, check outs, clean rooms ready, etc
but, as soon as you guys are all squared away we move into your pre departure process where the ops team reports everything, assigns your confirmation numbers, releases your vouchers, etc

everything will be available and viewable in your account. youll want to add your flight info into the flights tab too when you get those. so that we can schedule your transportation for when you land. and for the way back to the airport
hey checkin in, Alexa and Amelia are a little behind on payments, did they still plan on going?
They both said they did it last night does that show up on your end
Nah looks like theyve only paid their $200 deposit. still need the remaining balance for us to start getting the group processed
Amelia got logged out and can't get back in
Got you, is she forgetting her password?
She said she forgot it and it won't send her an email to reset

hey can you have amelia go back to this trip page https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/share/Z8M4DAG5W0 she'll select the join trip button next to her name, and will be able to create an account on her slot with a new log in
Did amelia's ever update her payment

Also for uploading flight details, we're all on different flights but want to be on the same shuttle to the resort when the last flight arrives, so should we all just upload the information for the latest flight that arrives

How different are your arrival times? I personally don't recommend waiting at the airport, I'd put your actual flight times down. The ppl that land the earliest are better off waiting at the resort than the airport
I'm more worried about two people shuttling alone
Is it ok to wait for like 1-1.5 hours?
One flight lands at 2, the next at 340. The ones on the last flight is only two girls who really don't want to shuttle alone
Tbh they won't be alone. There will be plenty of our other groups shuttling over to the resort as well
I'd be more concerned about them waiting at the airport alone
Even if it's a group of 6 waiting for an 1.5 hours?
Tbh they more than likely wont let you wait
Theres not really a waiting area in the exit lobby. a lot going on, a lot of people, there will be taxi guys tying to offer you rides, I'd honestly just get in and out

the two will be perfectly fine. there will be other travelers landing around the same time as them, its super easy to find our transportation team after you go through baggage claim. theyll be waiting there with a Go Blue Tours sign in a blue shirt. they wont miss it
Ive done the commute probably 10 times a this point lol. super easy and smooth. theyll be just fine
Ok I'm having people do their flight info
Not to be rude but we won't get scammed uploading passport info right lol
are you able to see who's done their flight upload and who hasn't
Someone put her passport info then got a new one is there a way for her to update?
hey apologies I missed these texts
need flight info from Bella, Taylor, Amelia, Alexa, Sofia, Alana
who was it that needs to update their passport
Kate Werner needs to update hers
let me know what the correct number is and I'll update
she can text me too if easier
are any of these on the same flight as you? Bella, Taylor, Amelia, Alexa, Sofia, Alana
Sofia and Alana are on the same flight as Kate and Sam
Amelia Taylor and Alexa need to upload theirs
hey hey mind reminding Amelia Taylor and Alexa about their flights
do they still need to do it?
I keep texting them there listening skills clearly aren't great
And is there anything else we need to do before we leave?
at the moment looking good. you'll each wanna fill out this e-ticket before you board https://eticket.migracion.gob.do/
I'll send this in an email in a couple dats to everyone
and then, did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
Ok thank you. I'll ask about add ons but probably not
I think I did the ETicket through my delta app
Are drinks at the resort included in the all included
yea! drink all day every day whenever lol
Alana forgot to upload her flight, she's going it now. In case they don't get the information, she's on the frontier flight with Sofia, Sam, and the others
It won't let her back into the website
I sent her that link we tried with Amelia, but that's not working either
I think she needs to be rewarded
yo! I see Alana's in there
also what troubles was she having getting onto the website? was the password incorrect
Yeah then it wouldn't send a password reset
okay and this was Alana right? I'll reset her password for her
hey wanna let Alana know her password code is now 0258152
Do you have more info on the booze cruise?
hey yea super dope vibe, its essentially a party on a boat for 3 hours, open bar. heres the vibe https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Is4RzNfxeZg
Is it like private or multiple groups
multiple groups that are traveling with us as well
Ok can we decide once we're there? Also how does dinner/reservations work

You can make dinner reservations for the private restaurants after check in. There will be a concierge desk where you put those in, they're included with your stay but reservations are first come first serve
Your booze cruise will be assigned during check in too. Our onsite staff will help you with everything
hey did y'all wanna add the booze cruise before you get here? It's been selling a lot
I think we're gonna decide once we all arrive Saturday!
your vouchers you'll screenshot or print and bring with you on the trip for check in!
ok So is it ok to not print
its your backup like proof of purchase for the different items included on your account
Liked “its your backup like proof of purchase for the different items included on your account”
yea you dont gotta print it, you can hit download and just screenshot everything
hey hey. safe travels today! see y'all when you get here
One of the girls has a flight at 3 tomorrow, what time should she get to the lobby for transport to the airport?
There's a form she'll want to fill out to get her exact time
She says her info is entered
Does she have a middle name?
Word have her try her full name
